$comment: Stable diagnostic event IDs for logs, receipts, support bundles, and fleet output.
description: Event IDs decouple log meaning from display copy. Visible messages can change without breaking event-based filters, receipts, or test assertions.

eventCategories.label: Lifecycle
eventCategories.description: Run start, stop, and cancellation events.

eventCategories.label: Download
eventCategories.description: Download attempts, cache hits, and hash verification outcomes.

eventCategories.label: Spicetify
eventCategories.description: Spicetify backup, apply, restore, and config operations.

eventCategories.label: Marketplace
eventCategories.description: Marketplace install, repair, and health status.

eventCategories.label: Health
eventCategories.description: Health check findings and overall results.

eventCategories.label: Config
eventCategories.description: Config load, save, quarantine, and migration events.

eventCategories.label: Task
eventCategories.description: Scheduled task register and unregister events.

eventCategories.label: Network
eventCategories.description: Network preflight checks and rate-limit detection.

eventCategories.label: Security
eventCategories.description: CVE exposure checks, execution policy, and trust verification.

events.name: RunStart
events.description: A LibreSpot run has been initiated.

events.name: RunComplete
events.description: The run completed successfully.

events.name: RunFailed
events.description: The run terminated due to an unrecoverable error.

events.name: RunCanceled
events.description: The run was canceled by the user or a controlling process.

events.name: DownloadStarted
events.description: A file download has been initiated.

events.name: DownloadVerified
events.description: A downloaded file passed hash verification.

events.name: DownloadFailed
events.description: A file download failed after all retry attempts.

events.name: CacheHit
events.description: A cached copy of the requested file was found and is valid.

events.name: CacheMiss
events.description: No cached copy exists; a fresh download is required.

events.name: HashMismatch
events.description: The downloaded file's hash does not match the expected value.

events.name: SpotXPatchStarted
events.description: SpotX patching has been initiated.

events.name: SpotXPatchVerified
events.description: SpotX patch was applied and post-patch verification passed.

events.name: SpotXPatchUnverified
events.description: SpotX patch was applied but post-patch verification could not confirm success.

events.name: SpotXPatchFailed
events.description: SpotX patching failed.

events.name: SpicetifyBackupStarted
events.description: Spicetify backup operation has been initiated.

events.name: SpicetifyApplyStarted
events.description: Spicetify apply operation has been initiated.

events.name: SpicetifyApplySucceeded
events.description: Spicetify apply completed successfully.

events.name: SpicetifyApplyFailed
events.description: Spicetify apply failed.

events.name: SpicetifyRestoreStarted
events.description: Spicetify restore operation has been initiated.

events.name: SpicetifyRestoreSucceeded
events.description: Spicetify restore completed successfully.

events.name: SpicetifyRestoreFailed
events.description: Spicetify restore failed.

events.name: MarketplaceInstalled
events.description: Spicetify Marketplace was installed successfully.

events.name: MarketplaceRepaired
events.description: Spicetify Marketplace was repaired after a detected issue.

events.name: MarketplaceMissing
events.description: Spicetify Marketplace was expected but not found.

events.name: WatcherTick
events.description: The auto-reapply watcher performed a scheduled check.

events.name: WatcherSkipped
events.description: The watcher skipped this tick because no reapply was needed.

events.name: WatcherReapplied
events.description: The watcher detected a change and successfully reapplied patches.

events.name: WatcherFailed
events.description: The watcher's reapply attempt failed.

events.name: HealthCheckStarted
events.description: A health check pass has been initiated.

events.name: HealthIssueFound
events.description: A health check detected an issue.

events.name: HealthCheckComplete
events.description: The health check pass finished.

events.name: OperationPlanned
events.description: An operation has been planned and added to the journal.

events.name: OperationExecuted
events.description: A planned operation was executed.

events.name: OperationSkipped
events.description: A planned operation was skipped.

events.name: ReceiptWritten
events.description: A run receipt was written to disk.

events.name: ConfigLoaded
events.description: Configuration was loaded from disk.

events.name: ConfigSaved
events.description: Configuration was saved to disk.

events.name: ConfigQuarantined
events.description: A config file was quarantined due to validation failure or corruption.

events.name: ConfigMigrated
events.description: Configuration was migrated from an older schema version.

events.name: PathEntryAdded
events.description: A directory was added to the PATH environment variable.

events.name: PathEntryRemoved
events.description: A directory was removed from the PATH environment variable.

events.name: TaskRegistered
events.description: A scheduled task was registered in Windows Task Scheduler.

events.name: TaskRemoved
events.description: A scheduled task was removed from Windows Task Scheduler.

events.name: NetworkPreflightPassed
events.description: Network preflight checks passed; required endpoints are reachable.

events.name: NetworkPreflightFailed
events.description: Network preflight checks failed; one or more endpoints are unreachable.

events.name: RateLimitDetected
events.description: An HTTP 429 or equivalent rate-limit response was received.

events.name: CveExposureChecked
events.description: A CVE exposure check was performed against the installed Spotify version.

events.name: TrustVerificationPassed
events.description: Digital signature or trust verification passed for a downloaded artifact.

events.name: TrustVerificationFailed
events.description: Digital signature or trust verification failed for a downloaded artifact.
